name: HWM_ALLOCATIONS_HDR_VL
query: SELECT TAH.ALLOCATION_ID ,TAH.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE ,TAH.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE ,TAH.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER ,TAH.ENTERPRISE_ID ,TAH.ALLOCATION_NAME ,TAL.DESCRIPTION ,TAH.CREATED_BY ,TAH.CREATION_DATE ,TAH.LAST_UPDATED_BY ,TAH.LAST_UPDATE_DATE ,TAH.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN ,TAH.DATA_LEVEL ,TAH.MODULE_ID FROM HWM_ALLOCATIONS_HDR_F TAH, HWM_ALLOCATIONS_HDR_TL TAL WHERE TAH.ALLOCATION_ID = TAL.ALLOCATION_ID AND TAL.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
